title: @(posedge clk_gated_stretched_frq) triggered, even when it didn't change

features.name: gated clock assignment using ternary operator
features.description: Code should include a gated clock assignment where the clock is conditionally passed through based on an enable signal using a ternary operator

features.name: always_ff with posedge on gated clock
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block that triggers on posedge of a gated clock signal
features.snippet:
always_ff @(posedge clk_control, negedge rst_n) begin
  if (!rst_n) begin
    current_position_reg <= 18'h0;
  end else begin
    current_position_reg <= current_position_reg + 1;
  end
end

features.name: multiple edge triggers in always_ff sensitivity list
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block with multiple edge triggers combining posedge and negedge on different signals
features.snippet:
always_ff @(posedge clk_control, negedge rst_n, posedge i_reset_zero) begin
  if (!rst_n || i_reset_zero) begin
    current_position_reg <= 18'h0;
  end else begin
    current_position_reg <= current_position_reg + 1;
  end
end
